tasks.title: Add star rating system to puzzles
tasks.description: Each puzzle gets par (piece count thresholds) for 1/2/3 stars. 1 star = solved. 2 stars = under par. 3 stars = optimal (fewest possible). Track pieces used by player (non-locked, non-water, non-scenery). Store stars in puzzleState.completed as { stars: N } instead of boolean true.
changes: Add 'par' and 'optimal' fields to each PUZZLES entry (existing 5 puzzles)
Modify checkPuzzleSolution() to count player-placed pieces and calculate stars
Update puzzleState.completed to store { stars: N } (backwards-compatible with true)
Update openPuzzleModal() card rendering to show star count (⭐⭐⭐)

tasks.title: Add CSS for star display on puzzle cards
tasks.description: Add .puzzle-card-stars styling for gold stars on the puzzle select modal cards.
changes: Add .puzzle-card-stars CSS class (gold color, proper sizing)

tasks.title: Add Puzzle 6: Switchyard
tasks.description: Use T-junctions to route train to correct station. Player places T-junctions and some straights to connect stations.
changes: Add puzzle object to PUZZLES array with id:6, locked pieces, available pieces, par/optimal

tasks.title: Add Puzzle 7: Speed Run (long track)
tasks.description: Build a long track loop using lots of straights and curves. Tests ability to connect a large circuit.
changes: Add puzzle object to PUZZLES array with id:7

tasks.title: Add Puzzle 8: Cow Pasture
tasks.description: Build a loop that passes by all 4 cow scenery tiles. Cows are pre-placed as scenery.
changes: Add puzzle object to PUZZLES array with id:8, with scenery (cows) pre-placed

tasks.title: Add Puzzle 9: Night Express
tasks.description: Build in night mode - puzzle forces night mode on load. Uses tunnel pieces.
changes: Add puzzle object to PUZZLES array with id:9
Modify loadPuzzle() to check forceNight and toggle night mode
Modify exitPuzzle() to restore previous night mode state

tasks.title: Add Puzzle 10: Multi-Train
tasks.description: Route 2 trains on separate loops without collision. Pre-places 2 trains and some track pieces.
changes: Add puzzle object to PUZZLES array with id:10
Add 'trains' field to puzzle definition for pre-placed trains
Modify loadPuzzle() to place trains from puzzle definition

acceptance_criteria: AC1: All 10 puzzles appear in the puzzle modal
AC2: Existing 5 puzzles still work correctly (backwards-compatible)
AC3: Star rating displays on puzzle cards (⭐/⭐⭐/⭐⭐⭐)
AC4: Stars persist across refreshes via localStorage
AC5: Old completions (boolean true) display as 1 star (backwards-compatible)
AC6: Puzzles 6-10 are solvable with the given pieces
AC7: Night Express puzzle (9) forces night mode on load, restores on exit
AC8: Multi-Train puzzle (10) pre-places trains correctly
AC9: Difficulty ramps appropriately across all 10 puzzles
AC10: Check button accurately validates all new puzzles
testing_focus: Test star rating calculation for each puzzle
Test night mode toggle in Night Express puzzle
Test train placement in Multi-Train puzzle
Verify no regressions in sandbox mode
Check puzzle exit restores sandbox state correctly
